name: gantts-app
description: gantts.app — a free, no-login, 100% client-side Gantt chart maker, plus its static SEO content site. Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS with no backend and no build step.
author: Synth88Labs

scripts.build: npm run gen:favicon && npm run gen:templates && npm run gen:thumbs && npm run gen:pages && npm run gen:i18n && npm run fix:switchers && npm run gen:sitemap && npm run check
scripts.check: npm run check:resources && npm run check:calendar && npm run check:msproject && npm run check:evm && npm run check:views && npm run check:ics && npm run check:mermaid && npm run check:assets && npm run check:urls && npm run check:links && npm run check:seo && npm run check:hreflang && npm run check:seo-i18n && npm run check:sitemap && npm run check:design
scripts.gen:pages: node scripts/gen-template-pages.js && node scripts/gen-guide-pages.js && node scripts/fix-guide-hreflang.js
scripts.deploy: npm run preflight && npm run deploy:bundle && node scripts/deploy-ftp.js --yes
scripts.ship: npm run build && npm run push && npm run deploy && npm run indexnow
